hero.title: AI-Powered Fundraising Solutions
hero.description: Accelerate your fundraising process with intelligent investor targeting, automated outreach, and AI-optimized pitch materials that convert.

features.title: Intelligent Investor Matching
features.description: AI-powered database of 10,000+ investors with smart matching based on stage, sector, and thesis.

features.title: Pitch Deck Optimization
features.description: AI analysis of successful pitch decks with recommendations for content, flow, and visual design.

features.title: Automated Outreach
features.description: Personalized email campaigns with AI-generated messaging tailored to each investor's interests.

features.title: Deal Room Management
features.description: Secure data rooms with automated due diligence tracking and investor communication logs.

features.title: Market Intelligence
features.description: Real-time funding trends, valuation benchmarks, and competitive landscape analysis.

features.title: Term Sheet Analysis
features.description: AI-powered term sheet comparison and negotiation guidance based on market standards.

steps.title: Strategy & Preparation
steps.description: Define fundraising goals, optimize pitch materials, and develop investor targeting strategy with AI insights.

steps.title: Investor Outreach
steps.description: Launch automated outreach campaigns with personalized messaging and intelligent follow-up sequences.

steps.title: Meeting Management
steps.description: Schedule and track investor meetings with automated follow-up and next step recommendations.

steps.title: Due Diligence
steps.description: Manage secure data rooms and track investor engagement with comprehensive analytics and reporting.

steps.title: Term Negotiation
steps.description: Compare term sheets, negotiate with AI-powered market intelligence, and close your round successfully.
